reviews.comment:
A los sres. que dirigen , les informo que el sr. que tienen en la parte de boxes, atiende  muy mal a los socios , hoy cambie  aceite y filtro y tuve el problema . pregunte  adelante si había que pedir turno , me contestaron que era por llegada. pero este sr. parecería que es el dueño . no comunica  nada atiende de muy mala gana y contesta mal . una cosa tan sencilla como es anotar a la gente por llegada el lo complica, deberían vigilar un poco a sus empleados.como socio lo único que pretendo es que me traten bien. lamento tener que hacer esta denuncia. pero me canse de aguantar. esto fue hoy en  aca flores. RIVADAVIA 7530 A LAS 9 DE LA MAÑANA.

(Translated by Google)
To the management, I'm writing to inform you that the gentleman in the service bay area treats members very poorly. Today I had my oil and filter changed and encountered this problem. I asked upfront if I needed to make an appointment, and they told me it was first-come, first-served. But this gentleman seems to think he owns the place. He doesn't communicate anything, serves customers very reluctantly, and answers rudely. He complicates something as simple as registering people on a first-come, first-served basis. You should supervise your employees a bit more. As a member, all I want is to be treated well. I regret having to make this complaint, but I'm tired of putting up with it. This happened today at the ACA Flores branch, Rivadavia 7530, at 9:00 AM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMS1tTFh3EAE
